creator: issyl0@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Oct 04, 2012 at 04:12:54PM +0000, issyl0@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Marking this PR as suspended:
>   - The www -> lists issue is no longer present as lists.freebsd.org now
>     works again.

Er, this should have read "http://www.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo now
works again".
